log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Round 1: Too far for melee. Spiritual Weapon + ranged.
MOVEMENT: Moves toward Shadar-Kai — Bardic Musician.

→ melee_spell attack: [d20:8+3=11 vs AC 14] MISS.

→ Shadar-Kai — Bardic Musician: DEX save [d20:13+6=19 vs DC 11] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Shadar-Kai — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 5 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):17+1=18 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):3+1=4 vs DC 16] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):20+1=21 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):11+1=12 vs DC 16] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Mage: WIS save [d20:19+4=23 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ 2/5 targets affected.
REASONING: Fireball on 1 targets!
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 14 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Shadar-Kai — Bardic Musician: SUCCESS. 12 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
